notes: Official LLI outlet page links a menu PDF and confirms the Lifelong Learning Institute outlet. Item names and prices were taken from a converted copy of the linked LLI menu PDF at https://manuals.plus/m/add4040ad9446079637b50d477f9ebf09b383f2ac0ad3d8b856f8631a91c3e38 because the official CDN PDF was not fetchable through the research browser. Prices are subject to service charge and GST.

items.name: Coexist Breakfast
items.description: Sourdough with sauteed mushrooms, herbed potatoes, roasted tomato, maple bacon, pork sausage and eggs.

items.name: Guac Toast
items.description: Brioche with guacamole, basil cherry tomatoes and feta.

items.name: Smoked Salmon Toast
items.description: Sourdough with smoked salmon, dill yogurt, capers, pickled onion and mesclun.

items.name: Chicken Waffle
items.description: Belgian waffle with buttermilk fried chicken and maple syrup.

items.name: Aglio Olio
items.description: Linguine with garlic, chili, parsley, kombu dashi and Grana Padano.

items.name: Ebiko Pasta
items.description: Linguine with ebiko cream, prawn stock, brandy, grilled prawns and nori.

items.name: Laksa Fish & Chips
items.description: Halibut with laksa cream sauce, pickles, mesclun and fries.

items.name: Chili Crab Shakshuka
items.description: Chili crab tomato dip with soft-shell crab, fried mantou and sous vide egg.

items.name: Coconut Brew
items.description: Twelve-hour cold brew coffee with coconut water.

notes: No official Singapore menu page with prices was found during research. This public menu page lists Arabica Singapore prices and includes the 56 Arab Street location; location was cross-checked against public Arab Street listing pages and Arabica's official locations site.

items.description: Bottled black cold brew coffee.
